sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33788" key="*(ellanodike/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἑλλᾱνοδικ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n33788.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be a judge at the games</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:6:1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.1.5</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:24:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
